summary: Iteration 180: Stripe Payment Integration Testing. All 22 backend tests pass. Fixed critical bug where /payment-success page was being intercepted by AuthCallback due to session_id query parameter conflict. Frontend PaymentModal has correct structure with Card/PayID selection. Payment success page renders correctly with processing, error, and retry states.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when Stripe session doesn't exist (expected with test key sk_test_emergent)
minor.note: This is expected behavior - the emergentintegrations library throws CheckoutError when session not found in Stripe

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: App.js AppRouter was intercepting /payment-success page because it checks for session_id in URL query params. Added exception for /payment-success path.
PaymentModal correctly implements two payment methods: 'Pay by Card' (Stripe Checkout) and 'Pay by PayID' (bank transfer)
PaymentModal has all required data-testid attributes for testing
PaymentSuccessPage correctly polls Stripe status and shows processing/confirmed/error states
Stripe create-checkout endpoint returns valid checkout.stripe.com URL
Admin user (djkingy79@gmail.com) has all features auto-unlocked, so Stripe checkout returns 400 'Feature already unlocked' for existing cases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 180 verified Stripe payment integration. Key findings: (1) POST /api/payments/stripe/create-checkout returns valid Stripe Checkout URL starting with https://checkout.stripe.com/, (2) GET /api/payments/stripe/status/{session_id} returns 404 for non-existent sessions (500 when session exists but Stripe API fails with test key), (3) PayID endpoints working correctly, (4) PaymentModal has Card/PayID selection screen with correct data-testid attributes, (5) PaymentSuccessPage renders correctly with polling and error states. FIXED: App.js was intercepting /payment-success due to session_id query param conflict with OAuth flow.

stripe_payments.POST /api/payments/stripe/create-checkou: PASS - returns url and session_id (or 400 if feature already unlocked for admin)

payid_payments.POST /api/payments/payid/create-referenc: PASS - returns trial or regular price

other_endpoints.GET /api/payments/prices: PASS - returns AUD prices for all features
other_endpoints.GET /api/cases/{case_id}/payments (valid: PASS - returns payments and unlocked features

frontend.payment_success_page: PASS - renders with processing, error, retry states
frontend.payment_modal_structure: PASS - has data-testid attributes for pay-by-card-btn, pay-by-payid-btn, payment-modal
frontend.case_detail: PASS - loads correctly with tabs (Documents, Timeline, Grounds, Reports, etc.)

bug_fixed.issue: PaymentSuccessPage was being intercepted by AuthCallback
bug_fixed.root_cause: App.js AppRouter checks for session_id in URL query params and redirects to AuthCallback. PaymentSuccessPage uses session_id for Stripe checkout session, causing conflict.
bug_fixed.fix: Added exception in AppRouter to skip AuthCallback redirect when pathname is /payment-success
